# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

Write secure code.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-app
        image: gcr.io/myproject/myimage:1.0   # replace with your actual Docker Image and Tag here, e.g., username/repo:tag or repo@sha256  (if the container is built from a source)   
      annotations:
         sidecar-istio.io/inject:"false" : This will disable Istio injection for this Deployment  
---    
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata: 
 name: myappingress    # replace with your actual ingress resource's namespace and name here, e.g., default or custom-namespace (if you have one)  
spec:    
 rules:     
 - host: "myhost"       #replace this value according to the requirement  i.e myappingress.yourdomain   
   http:         
     paths:          
     - pathType: ImplementationSpecific       
       path: "/path1/*, /another/path2/"      # replace with your actual urls here e.g., "*" or specific url  (if the ingresses need direct network access)   
         backend:         
            serviceName: my-app   #replace this value according to Deployment's name and namespace in kubernetes cluster, i.e app=myApp ns=default here    
           servicePort:       80  # replace with your actual port number if not default (if the ingresses need direct network access)
